results.description: The declared Bronze grain is composite (task_id, soc_code). Every (task_id, soc_code) pair must be unique. NULL soc_code is coalesced to '__NULL__' so the one expected NULL row (task_name='none' place

Bronze row count must fall in [3,800, 4,400] to reflect the expected 3,365 source tasks with documented multi-SOC fan-out. Count outside this band indicates a source-file change, a fan-out bug, or a p

task_pct is in percent units and represents a global share of classified Claude conversations. After even-split fan-out (raw_pct / N_soc_per_task), the sum across all Bronze rows must equal 100.0 with
task_pct is a percentage share. After fan-out split, per-row values must satisfy 0 <= x <= 100. Out-of-range values indicate a unit-conversion error (e.g. treating source pct as 0-1 instead of 0-100)

task_statement is the free-text task description and the semantic join key between Anthropic and O*NET. It must be populated for every Bronze row, including the 'none' placeholder row (where task_stat
task_id is part of the composite grain and must be present on every row, including the 'none' placeholder. A null task_id makes the row un-joinable and breaks grain uniqueness.

soc_code is NULL only for the task_name='none' placeholder row (exactly 1 expected NULL). Additional NULLs indicate a broken task->SOC join. Threshold is <= 5 NULLs to tolerate minor source drift (e.g
soc_code must be in XX-XXXX format after stripping the O*NET .NN detail suffix during ingest. A value like '15-1131.00', '151131', or empty string indicates the SOC normalization step in the ingestor

Per spec, when filtered >= 0.999 the ingestor emits NULL for BOTH automation_pct and augmentation_pct (whole task is filtered, not meaningful to report). These two fields must therefore be either both

source_release (e.g. 'release_2025_03_27') is the provenance stamp that pins the ingest to a specific HuggingFace release. Required because Anthropic publishes multiple releases with different schemas

The 8 Bronze rows with task_pct > 1.0 are documented in EDA as software-engineering / IT-support / technical-writing tasks. They must map to Computer (15-XXXX), Education (25-XXXX), Arts/Media (27-XXX
source_url must be populated and point to the Anthropic/EconomicIndex HuggingFace dataset. Required for CC-BY 4.0 attribution compliance.

ingested_at and load_date are required provenance fields. load_date must be within 30 days of query execution during active pipeline builds. Since this is a pinned static snapshot, stale load_date pas
source_method must be 'hf_git_clone' (normal HuggingFace git clone path) or 'local_cache' (offline fallback). Any other value indicates an ingestor configuration error or an unauthorized code path.

The source task_pct_v2.csv contains exactly one placeholder row with task_name='none' and pct=1.78 (1.78% of Claude traffic that couldn't be mapped to an O*NET task). Bronze must preserve this row ver
Every non-NULL soc_code value must match the canonical SOC regex '^\d{2}-\d{4}$' (two digits, dash, four digits). NULL is allowed only for the task_name='none' placeholder row (enforced separately by

31.69% of Anthropic tasks have filtered >= 0.999 (fully filtered). A large shift in this rate (outside 25-38%) suggests the source classifier behavior changed or the ingestor's NULL-emission threshold
